identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create an AI Course Builder that feels like an 'Intellectual Explorer' - blending the clarity of Swiss design with the warmth of organic growth.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with organic warmth.
Emotion First: Learning is growth (Organic) + structure (Swiss).
Content is King: The course material must shine; UI should be the stage, not the show.
Negative Space: Value empty areas for focus.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and action.

visual_strategy.theme: Light Mode Dominant (Intellectual/Academic) with Dark Mode Toggle
visual_strategy.archetype: The Intellectual Explorer (Swiss Structure + Organic Warmth)

primary.name: Deep Forest
primary.description: Used for primary actions, branding, and stability.

secondary.name: Burnt Orange
secondary.description: Used for accents, call-to-actions, and energy points.

colors.gradients: None. Use flat, deep colors or subtle noise textures.

headings.description: Tech-forward but human. Use for H1-H3.

code.description: For code snippets and technical terms.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 to p-12 for containers.
spacing.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard).

components.strategy: Use Shadcn UI for interaction, custom HTML/Tailwind for layout.

customization.buttons: Sharp edges or minimal rounded (rounded-md). Primary: Deep Forest bg, White text. Secondary: Outline.
customization.cards: Flat, 1px border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift + shadow-sm.
customization.inputs: High contrast borders on focus. bg-surface.

marketing.hero: Split screen or Center focus. Large typography. Abstract organic imagery.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Top header for search/profile.
dashboard.grid: High Density Grid (Mode B). 100% height widgets.
dashboard.course_view: Split view: Video/Content on left (70%), Playlist/Chat on right (30%).

hero_main.alt: Student studying in a modern library with organic architecture

course_design.alt: Abstract geometric art for design course

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'AI' gradients (purple/blue). Use solid, deep colors.
Ensure all text has high contrast (APCA standards).
Don't center everything. Use asymmetry for interest.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design system starting with the global CSS variables for colors. Install necessary fonts (Space Grotesk, DM Sans). Build the layout shell (Sidebar/Header). Then implement the pages. Use the provided image URLs. Do not ask for clarification.

tech_stack.frontend: React, Tailwind, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion
